clientMessages.author: davi_dinicio
clientMessages.content:
Hi <@1468656458630434992>,

I just read your messages and I want to be completely clear with you: this situation is completely unacceptable, and I am not going to let this continue.

I agree with you 100%. This needs to be resolved as quickly as possible, and I have zero tolerance for what you are experiencing right now. I am contacting the manager responsible for your account right this second, and I have already escalated your case to our team with maximum priority.

I checked the campaigns, and while I know that marketing results can take a little time to mature, if you are telling me you are operating at a loss, I cannot and will not let that happen under any circumstances. We are here to improve your business and make this an investment, not a sunk cost.

I am personally taking ownership of this. I will get this sorted out for you today. I'll be back in touch with an update very soon.

clientMessages.author: georgemeyer.
clientMessages.content: Thanks David PSL is a challenge . If you take note most of these leads come from women. In my 47 years of dealing with the public . They’ll get back to me in a month or two months or three months this is the bullshit that you hear all the time it’s like they all read off the same play card and this hasn’t changed in decades.

clientMessages.author: bilalshuja_
clientMessages.content:
<@1468656458630434992> To help improve lead quality and avoid attracting people from lower-income areas, we’re going to adjust the targeting strategy. Moving forward, we’ll focus only on specific ZIP codes where higher-income homeowners are more likely to live. This should help bring in prospects who are more financially prepared for larger remodeling projects like tub-to-shower conversions and full bathroom upgrades.

I’ll start refining the targeting on my end and monitor how the new leads come in. The goal is to reduce time spent on unqualified inquiries and increase the chances of booking appointments with homeowners who have the budget for these projects.

I’ll keep you posted as we make these adjustments and see new data come in.

clientMessages.author: bilalshuja_
clientMessages.content: Just made changes to your targeting

clientMessages.author: davi_dinicio
clientMessages.content:
Good morning.

I just want to get everything aligned with you. We just made the adjustments to the campaign. I understand you want faster results, but when changes are made, the results only start showing after Facebook approves those updates, so we need to give it a little time.

From today onward, the new leads will already reflect the changes. The leads from yesterday can’t really be considered because we were still making the adjustments.

I just ask for a bit of patience. Online marketing is usually exponential — it starts slower, but once it begins to scale, it keeps growing consistently. Let me know if you have any questions.
